zh.Arnecliff-in-Cleveland, West Riding, Yor: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.Arncliffe and Dale, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾阿可利福
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Colville於1347年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親William de Colville33歲，母親Joan Fauconberg25歲。他於1369年與Alice Darcy在英國越可爾阿可利福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1405年9月16日在英國達勒姆達勒姆享年58歲。

zh-hans.Arncliffe and Dale, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾阿可利福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Colville于1347年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭时，他的父亲William de Colville33岁，母亲Joan Fauconberg25岁。他于1369年与Alice Darcy在英国越可爾阿可利福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1405年9月16日在英国達勒姆達勒姆享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Colville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Colleville in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the Scandinavian personal name Koli (see Cole 2) + Old French ville ‘settlement, village’. The Scottish branch of the family were descended from Philip de Colville, who came to Scotland as a household knight of kings Malcolm IV (1153–65) and William ‘the Lion’ (1165–1214).

variants.name: Cole
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English and Old French personal name Col(e), Coll(e), Coul(e), a pet form of Nicol (see Nichol and Nicholas ), a common personal name from the mid 13th century onward. English families with this name migrated to Scotland and to Ulster (especially Fermanagh).

English: occasionally perhaps from a different (early) Middle English personal name Col, of native English or Scandinavian origin. Old English Cola was originally a nickname from Old English col ‘coal’ in the sense ‘coal-black (of hair), swarthy’ and is the probable source of most of the examples in Domesday Book. In the northern and eastern counties of England settled by Vikings in the 10th and 11th centuries, alternative sources are Old Norse Kolr and Koli (either from a nickname ‘the swarthy one’ or a short form of names in Kol-), and Old Norse Kollr (from a nickname, perhaps ‘the bald one’).
English: nickname for someone with swarthy skin or black hair, from Middle English col, coul(e) ‘charcoal, coal’ (Old English col).

variants.name: Colvin
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal, Antrim): variant of   Colville  , probably reflecting a local pronunciation. The name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century.
Manx: if not identical with 1, perhaps from the Old Norse personal name Kolbeinn, with /v/ substituted for /b/.

English: from the rare Middle English personal name Colwin, Colvin, which may be a borrowing into English of a Welsh name whose modern form is Collwyn ‘white’, or of colwyn ‘doe, puppy, pet dog’, or of the placename Colwyn (Denbighshire, Radnorshire).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Colville was born in 1347, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Colville, was 33 and his mother, Joan Fauconberg, was 25. He married Alice Darcy in 1369, in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 16 September 1405, in Durham, Durham, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Colville est né en 1347, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Colville, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Fauconberg, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice Darcy en 1369, à Arncliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1405, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Colville 1347 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Colville 33 und seine Mutter Joan Fauconberg 25. Er hat 1369 in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England Alice Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. September 1405 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Durham, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Colville è nato il nel 1347 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Colville, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan Fauconberg, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice Darcy nel 1369, nel Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1405, nel Durham, Durham, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Colvilleが1347年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父William de Colvilleは33歳，母Joan Fauconbergは25歳であった。1369年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルンクリフでAlice Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1405年9月16日にイギリスダルハムダルハムで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Colville(이)가 1347년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Colville(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Fauconberg(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1369년 영국 요르크실르 아클리프에서 Alice Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 9월 16일 영국 뒤람 뒤람에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Colville nasceu em 1347, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Colville, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fauconberg, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Darcy em 1369, em Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1405, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Colville родился в 1347 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Colville было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Fauconberg, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Darcy в 1369 г. в местности арнклифф, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 16 сентября 1405 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Colville nació en 1347, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Colville, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Fauconberg, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice Darcy en 1369, en Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1405, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
